title: CompetencyArea
description: A CompetencyArea node — a classification grouping related competencies (e.g. area:llm-foundations). Pure classification: people, resources, sectors and evidence attach to competencies, not to areas. Answers WHAT the organization can do; the parallel WHERE taxonomy is competency-sector.schema.json.

id.description: Area identifier. Grammar: 'area:' prefix + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-] (e.g. 'area:llm-foundations').

name.description: Human-readable area name in English per the competency catalog (e.g. 'LLM Foundations')

description.description: Optional longer description of the area's scope
